evals.expected_output: Loads due review cards and starts SRS session
expectations: Shows card count and offers mode selection

evals.prompt: quiz me on my React TILs
evals.expected_output: Starts review session filtered to React category
expectations: Generates questions specific to React content
Respects max 20 cards per session limit
Shows completion stats at the end

evals.prompt: test my knowledge — I want the detailed grading mode
expectations: Detects preference for detailed mode from prompt
Maps grades correctly: Again=1, Hard=3, Good=4, Easy=5
Shows next review date after each card
